\tzpentry{ID5566}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5566 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{ij} = \frac{K_0}{\Delta_{ij} + \delta}, \end{equation}
